issues.description: First action rests Self (this Character), but effect text says 'You may rest this Character' as a cost/requirement, not as part of the effect chain. The actual effect is to rest opponent's Character and attach DON. The self-rest should be a cost notation, not an action in sequence.

Action should allow choosing 0 or 1 opponent Character ("up to 1"), but Rest action does not naturally support optional targeting. Should be conditional or use a different structure to represent 'may'.

AttachDon specifies count:3, but effect says 'give up to 3 rested DON!! cards'. This means 0-3 DON cards (optional/variable), not fixed 3. Count should reflect optional/variable nature or be represented differently.
Target scope 'OwnLeader' is generic. Effect specifically requires attaching to '[Roronoa Zoro] Leader', which is a conditional requirement that should be validated or noted in target specification.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Activate: Main] You may rest this Character: Rest up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a base cost of 4 or less. Then, give up to 3 rested DON!! cards to your [Roronoa Zoro] Leader.
